description: Deterministic available Standing Agent state for current-page baseline capture. It intentionally contains no Mission, Wave, TeamRun, MemberRun, or Workflow assignment projection.
invariants: Research Partner is a durable AgentMember with an available (idle) status and a healthy runtime.
Provider sessions and ordinary messages provide continuous standing-agent activity without a current task.
The fixture contains no Mission, Wave, TeamRun, MemberRun, WorkflowRun, or WorkflowStep rows, so it cannot imply cross-executor assignment ownership.
